wireless.dashboardIntro: Manage your Chatforia mobile data, phone number, eSIM setup, and plan status.
wireless.plan.noneBody: Choose a data pack to activate Chatforia Mobile.
wireless.plan.noneBodyReady: Set up your eSIM first, then choose a data pack when you’re ready.
wireless.esim.heading: Set up your eSIM
wireless.esim.subheading: Install your eSIM to use Chatforia Mobile data on this device.
wireless.esim.body: Generate or open your eSIM QR code and follow the activation instructions on your phone.
wireless.esim.readyBody: Your eSIM is ready. You can open the QR code or continue managing your mobile plan.
esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.errorReserve: Could not reserve an eSIM. Please try again.
esim.iccidHint: The ICCID uniquely identifies this eSIM profile.
esim.secrecyNote: Keep this QR code private. Anyone with access may be able to install the eSIM.

upgrade.plans.plus.title: Plus
upgrade.plans.premiumMonthly.features.nu: Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active
upgrade.plans.premiumAnnual.features.num: Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active
upgrade.mobile.disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.
upgrade.mobile.packs.3gb.title: {{scope}} 3 GB
upgrade.mobile.packs.5gb.title: {{scope}} 5 GB
upgrade.mobile.packs.10gb.title: {{scope}} 10 GB
upgrade.mobile.packs.20gb.title: {{scope}} 20 GB
upgrade.mobile.packs.unlimited.title: {{scope}} Unlimited
upgrade.mobile.compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, and other apps on your phone).
upgrade.mobile.hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.
upgrade.mobile.card.feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable
upgrade.faq.free.a: Yes. The Free plan includes a Chatforia number, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay on Free as long as you like, or upgrade to remove ads and unlock more features.
upgrade.faq.plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium?
upgrade.faq.plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your message history — perfect for everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority support for heavy users.
upgrade.faq.esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work?
upgrade.faq.esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your country and device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app.
upgrade.faq.family.a: Family packs create a shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can invite or remove members and set limits per person.
upgrade.esim.local.3.desc: 3 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across your selected country.
upgrade.esim.local.5.desc: 5 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across your selected country.
upgrade.esim.local.10.desc: 10 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across your selected country.
upgrade.esim.local.20.desc: 20 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across your selected country.
upgrade.esim.local.unlimited.desc: Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across your selected country, subject to fair-use and local network availability.
upgrade.esim.europe.3.desc: 3 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
upgrade.esim.europe.5.desc: 5 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
upgrade.esim.europe.10.desc: 10 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
upgrade.esim.europe.20.desc: 20 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
upgrade.esim.europe.unlimited.desc: Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across supported European countries, subject to fair-use and local network availability.
upgrade.esim.global.3.desc: 3 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported global destinations.
upgrade.esim.global.5.desc: 5 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported global destinations.

about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
